headline: Guy's 'Quick Grocery Trip' Turns Into 4-Hour Debate With Himself About Which Olive Oil To Buy
summary: He left with 47 different olive oils and no actual food. He now hosts 'Olive Oil Wednesday.'
fullBody: Jake McOlive entered the grocery store for bread. He emerged 4 hours later with 47 bottles of olive oil. 'I needed to compare flavors,' Jake said. 'The differences are subtle but important.' He has since started 'Olive Oil Wednesday' with his friends. They taste and rate each oil. His bread is still at the store. Jake is 'proud of his commitment.'
